commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because this external PR lacks real behavior proof and changes an auth-provider boundary; maintainers may also want to choose between overlapping fix branches.; Needs attention: The diff changes a model-override authorization boundary and leaves the out-of-process gateway path inconsistently authorized.; Review finding: [P1] Authorize model overrides when no base scopes exist — src/a... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a root issue spec file, forwards resolved provider/model fields to the direct sub-agent gateway `agent` call, adds an override authorization flag for dispatch, and adds one subagent spawn regression test.

PR surface: Source +18, Tests +22, Docs +92. Total +132 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main resolves and persists the requested sub-agent model but the child gateway `agent` request omits provider/model, while the gateway handler rejects unauthorized override fields. I did not run the reporter's live QQ/Qwen/DeepSeek setup.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because this external PR lacks real behavior proof and changes an auth-provider boundary; maintainers may also want to choose between overlapping fix branches.
